name: carbon-footprint-platform
description: Full-stack carbon footprint tracking platform with Next.js frontend and Fastify backend

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd database && echo 'Run migrations manually on Neon or use a migration tool'
scripts.db:seed: cd database && echo 'Run seeds manually on Neon or use a migration tool'
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
